channel.title: Xiaomi Technology Co., Ltd. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Xiaomi Technology Co., Ltd. (xiaomi).

image.title: Xiaomi Technology Co., Ltd. — recent CVEs

item.title: CVE-2024-45347 · 9.6 CRITICAL — Mi Connect Service APP protocol flaws lead to unauthorized access
item.description: An unauthorized access vulnerability exists in the Xiaomi Mi Connect Service APP. The vulnerability is caused by the validation logic is flawed and can be exploited by attackers to Unauthorized access to the victim’s device.

item.title: CVE-2024-45361 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Mi Connect Service APP protocol flaws lead to leaking sensitive user information
item.description: A protocol flaw vulnerability exists in the Xiaomi Mi Connect Service APP. The vulnerability is caused by the validation logic is flawed and can be exploited by attackers to leak sensitive user information.

item.title: CVE-2024-45356 · 7.3 HIGH — Xiaomi phone framework has unauthorized access vulnerability
item.description: A unauthorized access vulnerability exists in the Xiaomi phone framework. The vulnerability is caused by improper validation and can be exploited by attackers to Access sensitive methods.

item.title: CVE-2024-45355 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Xiaomi phone framework has unauthorized access vulnerability
item.description: A unauthorized access vulnerability exists in the Xiaomi phone framework. The vulnerability is caused by improper validation and can be exploited by attackers to Access sensitive methods.

item.title: CVE-2024-45354 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — xiaomi shop application Webview has code execution vulnerability
item.description: A code execution vulnerability exists in the Xiaomi shop applicationproduct. The vulnerability is caused by improper input validation and can be exploited by attackers to execute malicious code.

item.title: CVE-2024-45353 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — quick App has intent redriction vulnerability
item.description: An intent redriction vulnerability exists in the Xiaomi quick App framework application product. The vulnerability is caused by improper input validation and can be exploited by attackers tointent redriction.

item.title: CVE-2024-45352 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Xiaomi smarthome application Webview has code execution vulnerability
item.description: An code execution vulnerability exists in the Xiaomi smarthome application product. The vulnerability is caused by improper input validation and can be exploited by attackers to execute malicious code.

item.title: CVE-2024-45351 · 7.8 HIGH — Game center application has code execution Vulnerability
item.description: A code execution vulnerability exists in the Xiaomi Game center application product. The vulnerability is caused by improper input validation and can be exploited by attackers to execute malicious code.

item.title: CVE-2024-45348 · 6.4 MEDIUM — Xiaomi Router AX9000 has a post-authorization command injection vulnerability
item.description: Xiaomi Router AX9000 has a post-authorization command injection vulnerability. This vulnerability is caused by the lack of validation of user input, and an attacker can exploit this vulnerability to execute arbitrary code.

item.title: CVE-2023-26322 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — GetApps application has code execution vulnerability
item.description: A code execution vulnerability exists in the XiaomiGetApps application product. This vulnerability is caused by the verification logic being bypassed, and an attacker can exploit this vulnerability to execute malicious code.

item.title: CVE-2023-26323 · 7.6 HIGH — Xiaomi App Market has a code execution vulnerability
item.description: A code execution vulnerability exists in the Xiaomi App market product. The vulnerability is caused by unsafe configuration and can be exploited by attackers to execute arbitrary code.

item.title: CVE-2023-26321 · 6.3 MEDIUM — The international version of Xiaomi File Manager has a path traversal vulnerability
item.description: A path traversal vulnerability exists in the Xiaomi File Manager application product(international version). The vulnerability is caused by unfiltered special characters and can be exploited by attackers to overwrite and execute code in the file.

item.title: CVE-2023-26324 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — GetApps application has code execution vulnerability
item.description: A code execution vulnerability exists in the XiaomiGetApps application product. This vulnerability is caused by the verification logic being bypassed, and an attacker can exploit this vulnerability to execute malicious code.

item.title: CVE-2024-45346 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — GetApps application has code execution vulnerability
item.description: The Xiaomi Security Center expresses heartfelt thanks to Ken Gannon and Ilyes Beghdadi of NCC Group working with Trend Micro Zero Day Initiative! At the same time, we also welcome more outstanding and professional security experts and security teams…

item.title: CVE-2023-26315 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Xiaomi router has a command injection vulnerability after authorization
item.description: The Xiaomi router AX9000 has a post-authentication command injection vulnerability. This vulnerability is caused by the lack of input filtering, allowing an attacker to exploit it to obtain root access to the device.

item.title: CVE-2023-26320 · 7.5 HIGH — Xiaomi Router external request interface vulnerability leads to stack overflow
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in a Command ('Command Injection') vulnerability in Xiaomi Xiaomi Router allows Command Injection.

item.title: CVE-2023-26319 · 6.7 MEDIUM — Xiaomi Router administration interface vulnerability leads command injection and stack overflow
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in a Command ('Command Injection') vulnerability in Xiaomi Xiaomi Router allows Command Injection.

item.title: CVE-2023-26318 · 6.7 MEDIUM — Xiaomi router web interface post-authorization stack overflow
item.description: Buffer Copy without Checking Size of Input ('Classic Buffer Overflow') vulnerability in Xiaomi Xiaomi Router allows Overflow Buffers.

item.title: CVE-2023-26317 · 7 HIGH 🌩️ — Xiaomi router external request interface has command injection
item.description: Xiaomi routers have an external interface that can lead to command injection. The vulnerability is caused by lax filtering of responses from external interfaces. Attackers can exploit this vulnerability to gain access to the router by hijacking the I…

item.title: CVE-2023-26316
item.description: A XSS vulnerability exists in the Xiaomi cloud service Application product. The vulnerability is caused by Webview's whitelist checking function allowing javascript protocol to be loaded and can be exploited by attackers to steal Xiaomi cloud service…

item.title: CVE-2020-14140 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: When Xiaomi router firmware is updated in 2020, there is an unauthenticated API that can reveal WIFI password vulnerability. This vulnerability is caused by the lack of access control policies on some API interfaces. Attackers can exploit this vulner…

item.title: CVE-2020-14131
item.description: The Xiaomi Security Center expresses heartfelt thanks to ADLab of VenusTech ! At the same time, we also welcome more outstanding and professional security experts and security teams to join the Mi Security Center (MiSRC) to jointly ensure the safe ac…

item.title: CVE-2020-14129
item.description: A logic vulnerability exists in a Xiaomi product. The vulnerability is caused by an identity verification failure, which can be exploited by an attacker who can obtain a brief elevation of privilege.

item.title: CVE-2020-14114
item.description: information leakage vulnerability exists in the Xiaomi SmartHome APP. This vulnerability is caused by illegal calls of some sensitive JS interfaces, which can be exploited by attackers to leak sensitive information.

item.title: CVE-2020-14126
item.description: Information leakage vulnerability exists in the Mi Sound APP. This vulnerability is caused by illegal calls of some sensitive JS interfaces, which can be exploited by attackers to leak sensitive information.

item.title: CVE-2020-14127
item.description: A denial of service vulnerability exists in some Xiaomi models of phones. The vulnerability is caused by heap overflow and can be exploited by attackers to make remote denial of service.

item.title: CVE-2020-14125
item.description: A denial of service vulnerability exists in some Xiaomi models of phones. The vulnerability is caused by out-of-bound read/write and can be exploited by attackers to make denial of service.

item.title: CVE-2020-14123
item.description: There is a pointer double free vulnerability in Some MIUI Services. When a function is called, the memory pointer is copied to two function modules, and an attacker can cause the pointer to be repeatedly released through malicious operations, resulti…

item.title: CVE-2020-14117
item.description: A improper permission configuration vulnerability in Xiaomi Content Center APP. This vulnerability is caused by the lack of correct permission verification in the Xiaomi content center APP, and attackers can use this vulnerability to invoke the sensi…

item.title: CVE-2020-14118
item.description: An intent redirection vulnerability in the Mi App Store product. This vulnerability is caused by the Mi App Store does not verify the validity of the incoming data, can cause the app store to automatically download and install apps.

item.title: CVE-2020-14120
item.description: Some Xiaomi models have a vulnerability in a certain application. The vulnerability is caused by the lack of checksum when using a three-party application to pass in parameters, and attackers can induce users to install a malicious app and use the vu…

item.title: CVE-2020-14122
item.description: Some Xiaomi phones have information leakage vulnerabilities, and some of them may be able to forge a specific identity due to the lack of parameter verification, resulting in user information leakage.

item.title: CVE-2020-14121
item.description: A business logic vulnerability exists in Mi App Store. The vulnerability is caused by incomplete permission checks of the products being bypassed, and an attacker can exploit the vulnerability to perform a local silent installation.

item.title: CVE-2020-14116
item.description: An intent redirection vulnerability in the Mi Browser product. This vulnerability is caused by the Mi Browser does not verify the validity of the incoming data. Attackers can perform sensitive operations by exploiting this.

item.title: CVE-2020-14115
item.description: A command injection vulnerability exists in the Xiaomi Router AX3600. The vulnerability is caused by a lack of inspection for incoming data detection. Attackers can exploit this vulnerability to execute code.

item.title: CVE-2020-14111
item.description: A command injection vulnerability exists in the Xiaomi Router AX3600. The vulnerability is caused by a lack of inspection for incoming data detection. Attackers can exploit this vulnerability to execute code.

item.title: CVE-2020-14112
item.description: Information Leak Vulnerability exists in the Xiaomi Router AX6000. The vulnerability is caused by incorrect routing configuration. Attackers can exploit this vulnerability to download part of the files in Xiaomi Router AX6000.

item.title: CVE-2020-14107
item.description: A stack overflow in the HTTP server of Cast can be exploited to make the app crash in LAN.

item.title: CVE-2020-14110
item.description: AX3600 router sensitive information leaked.There is an unauthorized interface through luci to obtain sensitive information and log in to the web background.

item.title: CVE-2020-14124
item.description: There is a buffer overflow in librsa.so called by getwifipwdurl interface, resulting in code execution on Xiaomi router AX3600 with ROM version =rom< 1.1.12.

item.title: CVE-2020-14119
item.description: There is command injection in the addMeshNode interface of xqnetwork.lua, which leads to command execution under administrator authority on Xiaomi router AX3600 with rom versionrom< 1.1.12

item.title: CVE-2020-14109
item.description: There is command injection in the meshd program in the routing system, resulting in command execution under administrator authority on Xiaomi router AX3600 with ROM version =< 1.1.12

item.title: CVE-2020-14130
item.description: Some js interfaces in the Xiaomi community were exposed, causing sensitive functions to be maliciously called on Xiaomi community app Affected Version <3.0.210809

item.title: CVE-2020-14105
item.description: The application in the mobile phone can read the SNO information of the device, Xiaomi 10 MIUI < 2020.01.15.

item.title: CVE-2020-14106
item.description: The application in the mobile phone can unauthorized access to the list of running processes in the mobile phone, Xiaomi Mobile Phone MIUI < 2021.01.26.

item.title: CVE-2020-14103
item.description: The application in the mobile phone can read the SNO information of the device, Xiaomi 10 MIUI < 2020.01.15.

item.title: CVE-2020-14099
item.description: On Xiaomi router AX1800 rom version < 1.0.336 and RM1800 root version < 1.0.26, the encryption scheme for a user's backup files uses hard-coded keys, which can expose sensitive information such as a user's password.

item.title: CVE-2020-14104
item.description: A RACE CONDITION on XQBACKUP causes a decompression path error on Xiaomi router AX3600 with ROM version =1.0.50.

item.title: CVE-2020-14102
item.description: There is command injection when ddns processes the hostname, which causes the administrator user to obtain the root privilege of the router. This affects Xiaomi router AX1800rom version < 1.0.336 and Xiaomi route RM1800 root version < 1.0.26.

item.title: CVE-2020-14098
item.description: The login verification can be bypassed by using the problem that the time is not synchronized after the router restarts. This affects Xiaomi router AX1800rom version < 1.0.336 and Xiaomi route RM1800 root version < 1.0.26.
